body.desc: The main topic or section title, e.g., 'OUR MISSION'.

title.desc: A statement of the company's mission, e.g., 'To turn verified revenue into financeable growth capital — b'.

body_2.desc: A section title for goals, e.g., 'OUR GOAL'.
